name: upload_file
description: Upload a file to a Backblaze B2 bucket. This is a two-step process: first call b2_get_upload_url to get a temporary upload URL and auth token for the target bucket, then POST the file content to that URL. The file is identified by its name within the bucket.

parameters.name: bucketId
parameters.description: The ID of the bucket where the file will be uploaded. Used in the b2_get_upload_url call.

parameters.name: X-Bz-File-Name
parameters.description: The name of the file, including any path prefix (e.g., 'photos/cat.jpg'). URL-encoded. Sent as a header on the upload request.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: The MIME type of the file. Use 'b2/x-auto' to let B2 detect it automatically.

parameters.name: X-Bz-Content-Sha1
parameters.description: SHA1 hash of the file content for integrity verification. Use 'do_not_verify' to skip (not recommended).
